overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a snowy mountain wilderness at dawn. The character traverses deep snow among pine trees and rocky outcrops, encountering a deer that crosses the path, while the camera follows steadily from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain valley with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow in a mountain valley toward a large pine tree

entered.detail: tall pine tree covered in snow standing prominently in the valley ahead
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the distance under pink dawn sky
deep snow covering the ground with visible footprints and trail
small dark wooden structure partially buried in snow on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open snowy mountain valley at dawn. A large snow-covered pine tree stands ahead in the center, with mountain peaks visible in the background. A small wooden cabin appears briefly on the left as the character passes by.

events.description: a deer runs across the path from right to left in front of the character

agents.ego_description: continuing through the forested area as a deer crosses the path ahead

notable_agents.action: deer running across the snowy path from right to left

entered.detail: cluster of snow-covered pine trees surrounding the path on both sides

segments.scene_description: The character enters a denser forest area with snow-laden pine trees lining both sides of the path. At approximately 28 seconds, a deer runs across the path from right to left. The mountains shift to the right side of the frame as the path curves through the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense snowy forest approaching large rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking toward large snow-covered boulders that block the path ahead

entered.detail: massive boulder completely covered in snow blocking the path ahead
steep rock face with snow patches rising on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive snow-covered boulder formation that dominates the center of the path. The pine trees shift to the left side as the terrain becomes more rocky, with a steep cliff face visible on the right. The distant mountains are now obscured by the rising terrain and trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy mountain wilderness that transitions from an open valley into a dense forest and finally toward a rocky cliffside. It begins with the character walking through an expansive valley at dawn, passing a solitary snow-covered pine and a small wooden cabin with distant peaks framing the horizon. As the path curves, the scene shifts into a thick grove of snow-laden pine trees where a deer suddenly darts across the trail from right to left. The environment then opens up as the trees recede to the left, giving way to a massive, snow-covered boulder formation that dominates the center of the path. Finally, the camera moves toward a steep cliff face on the right, with the rising rocky terrain gradually obscuring the distant mountains.
